problem: Why does biological neural computation use 20W while AI uses megawatts — what is different?
mechanism: Optical neural network for speed-of-light inference
hypothesis: If Optical neural network for speed-of-light inference is applied to what, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Comparative ablation study with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
